markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review technical SEO findings and align on content production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical Tech Issues:** Rimkus's site has major SEO problems (1,300 404s, 88 5xx errors, slow mobile speed) that are hurting performance and will be shared with their new web agency.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Audit Blocked:** GrowthX's technical audit is blocked by the WordFence firewall. Rimkus must whitelist Jakub's IP to enable a full analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** The weekly publishing goal is 5 articles. Starting next week, the mix will be 2 BES, 2 Forensics, and 1 high-priority refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Process Fixes:** To resolve review delays, Matthew will create an Airtable Loom tutorial and set up notification automations.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Audit Findings

  - [**Blocker:** The WordFence firewall blocks GrowthX's tools (e.g., Screaming Frog, Ahrefs), preventing a full technical analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [**Impact:** This causes false-positive errors and underreports page counts (e.g., Ahrefs sees \~280 pages vs. the actual \~1,000).](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Critical Issues Identified:**](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**404 Errors (1,300+):** A massive number of dead pages, likely from a past migration (e.g., `experts` → `expert` URL changes).](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
      - [**5xx Server Errors (88):** All from the `legacy.rimkus.com` subdomain, which was recently shuttered.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Canonical Tag Issues:** WordPress is creating indexable duplicate pages from URL query strings, bloating the crawl budget.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [**Slow Mobile Speed:** A site-wide issue with 11–12 second load times, significantly hurting mobile rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [**Underutilized Footer:** The footer lacks key architectural links, missing a major SEO opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Context:** Alishia confirmed these issues are a key reason for contracting a new web agency by year-end.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

### Content Production & Process

  - [**Performance:** 22 articles are now published, with 12 already generating traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [**Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
      - [**New Content:** 73 approved assignments are in the "Ready to Start" bucket.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** 31 high-priority articles are in Airtable's "Refresh" view.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [**Forensics:** Keyword research is in progress for new forensic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [**Review Process & Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Problem:** A disconnect between Rimkus's completed reviews and GrowthX's publishing status.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Goal:** A 5-article weekly publishing cadence, with reviews completed by the Wednesday sync.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Matthew will investigate the status of 6 reviewed articles and create an Airtable Loom tutorial to clarify the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Alishia:**](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Whitelist Jakub's IP in WordFence to unblock the technical audit.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Share the technical audit findings with the Rimkus web agency.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [Review the 6 articles in the "Ready to Review" queue by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [Investigate the status of the 6 articles Alishia confirmed reviewing.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [Create an Airtable Loom tutorial to clarify the content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
      - [Set up Airtable automations to notify Rimkus of pending reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [Rerun the technical audit once the IP is whitelisted to provide a full report.](https://fathom.video/share/uSEiLojTHZcHYMaxKDfAwygU_kv1e_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
